top_entities.name: Meta Platforms
top_entities.news_summary: Jury found Meta liable in NM child exploitation case ($375M damages). Separate CA jury found Meta/Google negligent in social media addiction trial ($6M). ~2,000 pending lawsuits from parents/schools. Courts bypassing Section 230 shield.

top_entities.name: OpenAI
top_entities.news_summary: New Yorker published major investigation (100+ sources, secret memos alleging 'pattern of lying') on April 7, 2026. Florida AG launched investigation over ChatGPT's alleged role in FSU shooting (April 9). Ongoing scrutiny over safety culture and whistleblower protections.

top_entities.name: Anthropic
top_entities.news_summary: Dropped flagship safety pledge in RSP v3 (Feb 2026), removing hard commitment to pause training if capabilities outstrip safety measures. Pentagon standoff over military AI guardrails led to federal agencies ordered to cease using Claude. Significant shift for self-proclaimed safety-first lab.

top_entities.name: Amazon
top_entities.news_summary: Settled NLRB Teamsters case over retaliation against striking workers (Mar 2026). Federal gov moving to settle landmark delivery driver classification case (Apr 2026). Congressional investigation ongoing into warehouse injury data manipulation.

top_entities.name: UnitedHealth Group
top_entities.news_summary: Under DOJ investigation for criminal healthcare fraud related to Medicare Advantage practices. Senate investigation found company 'aggressively gaming' Medicare to inflate reimbursements. Allegations of inflating diagnoses to maximize risk scores, including guiding providers to code opioid dependence inappropriately.

top_entities.name: Character AI
top_entities.news_summary: Settled lawsuits with Google over teen mental health harms and suicides (Jan 2026). Rolled out mandatory face-based age verification (Apr 2026). Banned minors from chatbot interactions entirely after multiple lawsuits alleging platform contributed to teen self-harm and exposed minors to explicit content.

top_entities.name: United States
top_entities.news_summary: HRW World Report 2026 describes 'decided shift toward authoritarianism.' Termination of federal DEI programs, violent ICE raids, dismantling of USAID, withdrawal from UN Human Rights Council, WHO, Paris Climate Accords. Foreign aid cut by billions. Major civil rights rollbacks across immigration, health, environment, labor.

top_entities.name: Waymo
top_entities.news_summary: NHTSA investigation opened after Waymo vehicle struck child near elementary school in Santa Monica (Jan 2026). Separate NTSB investigation into robotaxis illegally passing stopped school buses in Austin (19+ incidents). Federal scrutiny intensifying.

top_entities.name: Microsoft
top_entities.news_summary: $3.3M export control/sanctions penalties from Treasury/BIS (Apr 2026). Class action over Teams biometric voice data collection (Feb 2026). Moderate events but company maintains high composite score.

top_entities.name: Walmart
top_entities.news_summary: FTC settlement of $100M over deceptive earnings claims for Spark Driver delivery service (Feb 2026). Failing to disclose conditions for incentive pay and withholding collected tips. Ongoing labor concerns.

top_entities.name: Abbott Laboratories
top_entities.news_summary: $70M jury verdict (Apr 10, 2026) in infant formula NEC trial. Second trial defeat. Faces 1,700+ lawsuits with potentially billions at stake. Workers also report unsanitary practices at formula plants.

top_entities.name: Perplexity AI
top_entities.news_summary: Class-action lawsuit filed April 1, 2026 alleging secret data routing to Meta/Google via hidden trackers including in Incognito mode. NYT copyright infringement suit ongoing. Pattern of ignoring Robots Exclusion Protocol.

top_entities.name: Starbucks
top_entities.news_summary: Union filed bad faith bargaining complaint (Apr 2026). ALJ found 'scorched earth' anti-union campaign. Record NLRB violations. Dissolved board labor relations committee. Open-ended strike in late 2025 with 4,500+ workers at 230 stores.

top_entities.name: Groq
top_entities.news_summary: Subject of $20B Nvidia licensing deal under Senate antitrust scrutiny. Senators Warren/Blumenthal questioning whether deal is structured to evade merger review. Deal effectively eliminates Groq as independent AI inference competitor.

top_entities.name: Tesla Optimus
top_entities.news_summary: Optimus production ramped at Fremont (Jan 2026), targeting 50K-100K units. Musk suggested robots could 'prevent future crime' raising surveillance/privacy concerns. Cybersecurity researchers flagging remote hijacking risks. No humanoid-specific ISO standards yet.

sector_alerts.alert: Anthropic-Pentagon military AI standoff reshaping entire sector. Anthropic dropped flagship RSP safety pledge; federal agencies ordered to stop using Claude. OpenAI facing parallel scrutiny (New Yorker investigation, FL AG probe). EU AI Act high-risk system obligations enforceable Aug 2, 2026. Character AI settling child safety lawsuits, banning minors. Grok deepfake scandal prompting regulatory investigations in US and EU.

EEOC sending letters to Fortune 500 CEOs signaling new enforcement phase on workplace diversity programs (Feb 2026). DEI participation in HRC Corporate Equality Index dropped 65%. Kroger CEO resigned after ethics probe. Multiple major companies facing landmark labor/safety verdicts (Meta $375M, Walmart $100M FTC, Abbott $70M, Amazon NLRB settlements).

China published world's first comprehensive national humanoid robot standards (HEIS 2026). EU AI Act classifies autonomous robots as high-risk AI systems with Aug 2026 enforcement deadline. No ISO standard exists yet for dynamically balancing legged robots. Tesla Optimus ramping to 50K-100K units with unresolved safety and liability frameworks.

HRW World Report 2026 documents global democratic recession. US described as shifting toward authoritarianism with major rights rollbacks. Sudan, Palestine, Myanmar top humanitarian emergency lists. Ukraine casualties up 31% year-over-year. Hungary in political transition with HRW calling for rights restoration. South Korea recovering from martial law crisis.
